calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2022 Off Calendar

Motion To Dismiss First Amended Complaint Following Plaintiffs Failure To Amend; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar May-02-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Dismiss First Amended Complaint Following Plaintiff's Failure To Amend.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant the State Bar of California's unopposed motion to dismiss the First Amedned Complaint is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2022 Continued To May-18-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2021 Continued To Mar-16-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2021 Continued To Jan-12-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-13-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Carissa Andresen, Esq. (415-538-2029; carissa.andresen@calbar.ca.gov) Assistant General Counsel for Defendant.
No appearances.

Not Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend. As defendant demurs, the handwritten FAC "is unintelligible and does not contain factual allegations that apprise the State Bar of the issues and claims against it." (CCP 430.10(f).) Parts of the FAC that are semi-legible refer to "war crimes" and 60 some commercial establishments in Marin County.

Order is signed.
